_source: sarvatobhadra.com/arudha-lagna-bhav-padas (web reference for the Jaimini Arudha technique). NOT from the Kurczak & Fish set — those cover only the prasna/directional Arudha, not this natal one.
_note: ARUDHA LAGNA (AL) is the technical name for David's whole fight: IDENTITY AS RECEIVED IN THE WORLD. The Lagna is the inner self; the AL is the PUBLIC IMAGE — how the world sees, knows, and responds to you, 'the mask you wear in public.' 'Arudha' = mounted/risen = something made visible. This is the deterministic anchor for velea-dharma-is-identity-not-work: the 'identity' knot theme should ultimately be read from the AL, not defaulted to career. Renunciates transcend AL (their identity dissolves).

arudhaLagna: 1. Count from the Ascendant to its lord (n signs).
2. Count the same number (n) forward again from the lord's position.
3. The sign arrived at is the Arudha Lagna.
SPECIAL RULE: if the AL lands in the 1st or 7th house from the lagna, move 10 signs further from there — these two houses are the exceptions (an image can't sit right on the self or its mirror).

lagnaLordHouseToAL._desc: Shortcut table: Ascendant lord's house → resulting AL house (the two-in-one column reflects the 1st/7th exception folding pairs together).

calculation.bhavaPada: Every house (bhava) has its OWN arudha — the Bhava Pada — computed the same way but from THAT house's lord. A2 = the image of one's wealth, A3 = of one's efforts/siblings, … A12 = of one's losses. (AL itself = A1, the pada of the lagna.)

planetOnAL._desc: What a planet lends the public image when it influences the AL — by lordship, placement, or rasi drishti (sign aspect).

strengthFlips: The planet's dignity flips the image: a DEBILITATED Saturn on the AL reads as rigid, incapable, complaining; an EXALTED Saturn reads as hard-working, traditional, patient. Read the live condition, never the planet in the abstract.
predictiveRules: Benefics (Jupiter, Venus, Moon, uninflicted Mercury) in the 1/2/4/5/7/8/9/10/11 FROM THE AL give positive results.
Malefics (Mars, Saturn, Rahu, Ketu, Sun) in the 3rd/6th/11th from the AL can also benefit — strength and resilience.
Guna: Sattva (Jupiter, Sun, Moon) enhances a moral/spiritual image; Rajo (Mercury, Venus) a dynamic, engaging public personality.
A STRONG 11th from the AL brings wealth, success, public admiration; if all planets sit in or rasi-aspect it, the person can rise to 'royal' status.
Jupiter, Moon or Venus in the 2nd or 7th from the AL → abundant wealth and a favorable image; an EXALTED planet in the 2nd or 7th from AL dramatically boosts status and reputation.
Many planets in the 12th from the AL → losses, criticism, image-related challenges.
_veleaUse: Compute the AL (and key bhava padas) deterministically and feed the 'identity' knot from it, so 'identity as received in the world' is read from the AL sign + whatever shapes it — the true fix for reading the 10th as 'career'. NOT yet wired into server/vedic/knots.ts (identity currently keys on 1st/10th + Sun); AL computation is the next enhancement. See velea-dharma-is-identity-not-work, velea-meridian-is-the-spine.
